projectDescription: A searchable and filterable web directory of React Native libraries with compatibility metadata, quality scoring, and a public JSON API.
keyFeatures: Searchable and filterable catalog of 2,300+ React Native libraries
Platform compatibility tags (iOS, Android, Web, Windows, macOS, tvOS, visionOS, etc.)
New Architecture support detection and filtering
Directory Score: multi-factor quality scoring for each library
Trending Score: popularity growth metric based on download trends
Public JSON API for programmatic access
Expo Go and config plugin compatibility tracking
VS Code extension, CLI tool, and Raycast extension integrations
publicApiSurface: GET /api/libraries — list, search, filter, and paginate libraries
POST /api/libraries/check — batch compatibility metadata lookup by npm package names
GET /api/library — lookup one or more libraries by npm package name
GET /api/proxy/npm-stat — proxy to npm-stat.com for download count history
